name: HWR_SLEEP_PTRN
description: The sleep pattern table stores user sleep pattern data.

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the wellness user table.

columns.Name: SLEEP_PATTERN_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: COLOR
columns.Comments: This is the color of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: BED_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the total bed time of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: SLEEP_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the total sleep time of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: AWAKE_TIME
columns.Comments: This is the total awake time of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: SLEEP_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This is the sleep number of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: SCORE
columns.Comments: This is the score of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: WAKENINGS
columns.Comments: This is the number of wakenings of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: LOCATION
columns.Comments: This is the location of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the source id of the sleep pattern.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
